one_time_description: First Peoples Cultural Council grant of $388,000 received and deferred, non-recurring in prior year
economic_notes: 17.90% interest in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership valued at $1,338,438. Nominal interests in All Nations Trust Company, BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP, and BC First Nations Gaming Sharing General Partner Ltd.
notes: Auditor firm identified by address and partners (Port Coquitlam, BC - Ribeyre CPA). No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Deferred revenue line of -$489,319 reduces total revenue on statement of operations. Government of Canada line of $639,353 appears in 2023 comparative only with no 2024 figure shown in revenue lines but $76,783 appears in budget column — likely a formatting issue in source document; $639,353 used as 2023 figure, $76,783 as budget. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,743,128 + CMHC $81,912 + FNHA $65,760 + FNESC $96,466 + FPCC $388,000 + FTISC $357,480 + New Relationship Trust $260,000 + Province of BC $337,781 + SASET $21,252 = $3,351,779 less deferred revenue adjustment; net deferred revenue change of -$489,319 applied proportionally. OSR includes investment income, property tax, rental, other income. No remuneration schedule included in financial statements provided. Prior year audited by a different auditor.
